overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic waterfront promenade in a cyberpunk city at dusk. The character walks from a sidewalk into a covered arcade with orange arches, emerges into an open plaza with digital billboards, and continues along the waterfront with views of the bay and distant skyline.

segments.scene_description: Walking along an urban waterfront sidewalk at dusk, with a concrete retaining wall on the left and a street with sparse traffic on the right. The camera follows pedestrians toward a covered arcade structure in the distance, passing mature street trees and modern architecture.

moving under the glass canopy creates mixed lighting conditions

transparent glass panels forming the arcade ceiling

segments.scene_description: Turning left off the sidewalk into a semi-covered plaza with distinctive orange arched supports and a glass canopy overhead. The lighting shifts to a mix of natural dusk and artificial illumination as the camera moves deeper into the arcade structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with glass roof and integrated trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered arcade, passing benches and trees

segments.scene_description: Walking through the covered arcade beneath the glass and orange beam structure. The path is lined with benches and trees integrated into the sheltered space, with a few pedestrians scattered throughout the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront plaza with large digital advertising screens

turning right toward the waterfront promenade

food stall with giant glowing noodle bowl on roof

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered arcade into a wide open plaza with large digital billboards and a view of the waterfront. The camera turns right toward the water, passing a distinctive noodle stand with a giant glowing bowl on its roof and a parked van.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with bay view and distant skyline

camera pans right to look across the water at the distant skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront and pausing to look out at the water and distant structures

segments.scene_description: Walking along the waterfront promenade with the bay on the right, passing the noodle stand and approaching the railing. The camera pans to take in the view of the calm water, distant roller coaster, and futuristic skyline towers across the bay, with people visible on an elevated observation deck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet urban sidewalk into a sheltered architectural arcade before opening onto a vibrant, futuristic waterfront plaza. It begins by following pedestrians along a concrete retaining wall at dusk, passing street trees and modern buildings toward a distant structure. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts from the open street into a semi-covered plaza characterized by a glass canopy and distinctive orange arched supports. The scene then progresses through this sheltered arcade, moving past integrated benches and greenery before emerging into a wide open plaza dominated by large digital billboards. Finally, the camera turns toward the bay, passing a glowing noodle stand to reach the promenade railing, where the view expands to reveal a calm harbor and a distant skyline of futuristic towers.
